matches.title: AI Weekly: major new deals and stumped Fed officials
matches.text: STORY: From major new deals to stumped Fed officials, This is AI Weekly. :: AI Weekly OpenAI is considering a contract with NATO, a source confirmed to Reuters. It comes days after the ChatGPT-owner struck a deal with the Pentagon. An initial Wall Street Journal report said that the contract opportunity was to deploy AI tools on NATO's "unclassified networks."That’s in contrast with its Pentagon agreement, which will see its technology used in classified networks there. NATO didn't immediately r

matches.title: Exclusive-Anthropic investors push to de-escalate Pentagon clash over AI safeguards, sources say
matches.text: Some Anthropic investors are racing to contain fallout from the AI research lab's dispute with the Pentagon, seven people familiar with the matter said, for fear that an ongoing spat could devastate the company's business.  In recent days, CEO Dario Amodei has discussed the matter with some of ‌Anthropic's major investors and partners, including Amazon.com CEO Andy Jassy, two of the people said.
